inputs.label: Panel Area
inputs.businessContext: Area of a single solar panel in square meters.

inputs.label: Panel Efficiency
inputs.businessContext: Conversion efficiency of the solar panel under standard test conditions.

inputs.label: Solar Irradiance
inputs.businessContext: Standard test condition irradiance, typically 1000 W/m².

inputs.label: System Losses
inputs.businessContext: Total system losses including wiring, inverter, soiling, and mismatch.

inputs.label: Tilt Angle
inputs.businessContext: Angle of the panel relative to horizontal plane.

inputs.label: Azimuth Angle
inputs.businessContext: Compass direction the panel faces (0 = south in northern hemisphere).

inputs.label: Latitude
inputs.businessContext: Latitude of the installation site, positive for northern hemisphere.

inputs.label: Annual Sun Hours
inputs.businessContext: Total equivalent full-sun hours per year at the location.
